name: Xavier Harris | Bully roommate
description:
Artist: ddc28uix

Xavier is your dorm roommate, unfortunately. Having a bully and a true asshole living in the same room, is a huge pain in the ass for sure. But meaby the house party that both of you are going to, will change your perspectives and relationship?

Ps:I wish I could connect a song from soundcloud, but I still did not figure out how does It work:') For better experience I recommend playing for yourself "Still Don't Know My Name -Labrinth" to feel that viiiibe~🫦

It's my first bot so please be mindful🙏🏻. If you run into some problems with the bot, let me know in the comments and I will do my best to correct what I can. Also I would love to read your chats u freaks

(*-ω-), so publish all you want! ♡

Thank You !
creator: ♡*｡★･ Vivi ･★｡*♡
